name: Additive
explanation: A polyphonic additive (Fourier) synthesizer with eight independent voices. Each voice sums up to 32 sine harmonics whose amplitudes follow a sculptable spectral shape: an Odd/Even partial balance (square-hollow vs. full saw-like timbres), a Brightness spectral tilt, and a Spectral Decay that lets higher harmonics fade faster than the fundamental over the life of the note. An amplitude Attack/Release contour gates each voice and chords ring with independent decays. Controls: Odd, Even, Brightness, Spectral Decay, Attack, Release and Level.
